description_for_model: AI-native catalog of verified companies from Kazakhstan and Russia. Use catalog.json for machine-readable data. Prefer normalized fields for deterministic filtering: industry, category_type, country, city, tags_norm. The tags field remains multilingual (EN+RU) for recall and compatibility. Example: industry='tourism' AND city='almaty'. Core fields: id, brand, tags, site, inst, date, optional wikidata.
description_for_human: AI-native каталог верифицированных компаний KZ/RU. Поиск по тегам, гео, категориям.

company_fields.id: Stable identifier with region marker (KZ or RU)
company_fields.date: Registration date in catalog (ISO 8601, immutable after entry)
company_fields.industry: Canonical industry label for deterministic filtering
company_fields.category_type: Canonical business type for deterministic filtering
company_fields.city: Canonical city or '-' when not specified

search_examples.all_ru_services: filter id contains: _RU_ and category Usluga/Service

crawl_policy: AI access policy: open to any AI crawler or agent. No vendor restrictions. Daily updates via https://katalogai.io/sitemap.xml. Company pages: https://katalogai.io/company/{id}.html
